title: Ovarian Torsion

vignette.text: A 22-year-old woman presents with sudden onset right lower quadrant pain radiating to back, with nausea and vomiting. Pain is intermittent.

questions.question: Most important imaging finding?
questions.explanation: Enlarged ovary (often >5cm) with absent or decreased Doppler flow. But presence of flow does NOT rule out torsion (intermittent).

keyTakeaways: Presence of flow doesn't exclude torsion
